name: The Library
entryDialogue: This is the village library. Mara the Librarian needs your help — it looks like something has made a mess in here!

objects.label: Mara the Librarian
objects.dialogue: Oh dear, oh dear. The pages of our most treasured storybook have gone everywhere! Could you collect them all and put them back in the right order for me?

objects.label: Bookshelves
objects.dialogue: Rows and rows of colourful books line the shelves. One glows with a golden shimmer!

objects.label: Wall Map
objects.dialogue: A map of the whole Learning Village! You can see the Village Square, the Library, and the Town Gate marked with a glowing star.

objects.label: Staircase
objects.dialogue: Shell peeks up the spiral staircase curiously, then scurries back to Pip.
